questionHtml:
What is a common feature of enzymes?


A.  They all react with substrates.

B.  They all decrease the rate of reaction.

C.  They are all secreted from cells in vesicles.

D.  They all bind to the active site of their substrate.

meta.title: What is a common feature of enzymes? A. They all react with substrates. B. They all decrease the rate of reaction. C. They are all secreted from cells in vesicles. D. They all bind
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.2. Role of enzymes in metabolism
